title: citrus × aurantium subf. iyo
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. iyo, also known as bitter orange peel, is a type of citrus plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its high concentration of limonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subf. iyo include its ability to aid in weight loss, improve digestion, and reduce stress levels, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Citrus × aurantium subf. iyo include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
